creator: pfgiffun@bachue.usc.unal.edu.co
text:
I made some cleaning on the NetBSD patches, which are based on our port,
in order to update this port. I would prefer if someone checks well the 
packaging (th beast is big).
It would be trivial to add Tcl/Tk support, but I didn't see any advantage.

How-To-Repeat: The changes (and the port) are big so I prefer to send the complete 
port.
